fields.title: Add loop capability contract schema for tools and agents
fields.description: Ralph needs a serialized Tau-owned execution contract so loop sessions do not depend on ambient Pi active tools or project agent menu state. Skills are explicitly out of scope for this slice.
fields.design: Extend the canonical loop/execution schema with a capability contract that covers tools and agents only. Represent tools as strict policy plus ordered tool names and optional available-tool metadata/fingerprint; represent agents as enabled agent names plus optional registry fingerprint. Store serializable identifiers and metadata, never tool implementations, command handlers, renderers, skill bodies, or Pi runtime objects. Keep invalid/missing contract states fail-fast with clear LoopContractValidationError messages.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Loop state can encode and decode a Ralph capability contract containing tools and agents, skills are absent from the contract, invalid tool/agent contract shapes fail schema validation, and tests cover successful decode plus invalid states.
